segments.scene_description: The player ascends a grand stone staircase inside a dimly lit building, approaching an ornate entrance with stone pillars and a hanging lantern. The environment is dark and enclosed with marble floors and metal railings.

segments.scene_description: The player explores an elevated glass atrium with panoramic views of a dystopian cityscape. Sunlight streams through the curved glass roof as futuristic skyscrapers and construction cranes dominate the horizon. The camera occasionally tilts upward to admire the architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the oppressive shadows of a decaying neo-classical interior into a luminous, futuristic glass atrium. It begins with an ascent up a grand stone staircase past ornate pillars and hanging lanterns, moving through dimly lit corridors where marble floors give way to graffiti-covered walls. As the camera approaches a bright exit, the artificial gloom shifts into natural light, leading the viewer onto a glass-enclosed walkway where a brief combat encounter unfolds near leather lounge chairs. The scene then expands into a vast, elevated atrium as sunlight streams through a curved glass roof, revealing a panoramic view of a dystopian cityscape. Finally, the camera tilts upward to capture the scale of the architecture against a horizon dominated by futuristic skyscrapers and construction cranes.
